summary: Full System Audit of MESA POS RD completed. Fixed 2 critical bugs: (1) /api/theme-config 404 - Added endpoint alias in config.py, (2) /api/inventory/products-stock 404 - Added full product stock status endpoint. All 37 backend API tests passed. All major frontend pages verified working: Dashboard, Tables, OrderScreen, Kitchen, Cash Register, Inventory Manager (11 tabs), Settings (14 tabs), Reports (4 categories), Customers, Reservations.

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Frontend ThemeContext.js called /api/theme-config but backend had /api/theme
bugs_fixed.fix: Added /api/theme-config endpoint alias in /app/backend/routers/config.py with glassmorphism theme defaults

bugs_fixed.root_cause: OrderScreen.js line 243 called inventorySettingsAPI.getProductsStockStatus() but endpoint didn't exist

frontend: Dashboard loads - Shows sales metrics, hourly chart
Tables page (/tables) - Table map renders with clickable tables
OrderScreen (/order/:tableId) - Loads product catalog, order panel, categories
Kitchen (/kitchen) - Shows 'Sin ordenes pendientes' with EN VIVO indicator
Cash Register (/cash-register) - Shows shift management, B04, CIERRE Z buttons
Inventory Manager (/inventory-manager) - All 11 tabs: Insumos, Producción, Almacenes, Proveedores, Recetas, Stock, Compras, Valorización, Auditoría, Config, Asistente
Settings (/settings) - All 14 tabs including Usuarios, Impuestos, Sistema
Reports (/reports) - 4 categories: Ventas y Caja, Inventario/Almacén/Compras, Fiscal, Auditoría y Operaciones
Customers (/customers) - Customer list with loyalty points
Reservations (/reservations) - Reservation calendar with date picker

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_system_audit_full.py - Created comprehensive 37-test suite for full system audit
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full system audit completed. Two 404 bugs were fixed: /api/theme-config and /api/inventory/products-stock. All backend APIs return 200 OK with valid JSON. All frontend pages load correctly. The stale order 404 errors seen in console are expected behavior (deleted orders). Admin PIN: 10000. Inventory tabs all verified working. Reports categories all verified. Settings tabs all verified.
notes_on_remaining_404_console_errors: Console still shows 404 errors for specific order IDs (e.g., /api/orders/e3b71c59-7ec6-43fa-bb09-b1b4570be140). This is EXPECTED behavior - these are stale references to orders that were deleted. The backend correctly returns 404 with 'Orden no encontrada' for non-existent orders. This is NOT a bug.
